zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan De Longueville於大約1350年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾蕾托 比林時，她的父親Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville22歲，母親Julianne de Ferrers27歲。她於1384年之前與John Heylesdon結婚。她去世於1420年在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan De Longueville于大约1350年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾蕾托 比林时，她的父亲Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville22岁，母亲Julianne de Ferrers27岁。她于1384年之前与John Heylesdon结婚。她去世于1420年在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan De Longueville was born about 1350, in Little Billing, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville, was 22 and her mother, Julianne de Ferrers, was 27. She married John Heylesdon before 1384. She died in 1420, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan De Longueville est née environ 1350, à Little Billing, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Julianne de Ferrers, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Heylesdon avant 1384. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan De Longueville um 1350 in Little Billing, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville 22 und ihre Mutter Julianne de Ferrers 27. Sie hat vor 1384 John Heylesdon geheiratet. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Longueville è nata il circa 1350 nel Little Billing, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Julianne de Ferrers, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Heylesdon prima del 1384. Morì nel 1420, nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan De Longuevilleが約1350年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリットル ビリングで生まれた時，父Sir John FitzJohn de Longuevilleは22歳，母Julianne de Ferrersは27歳であった。1384年以前にJohn Heylesdonと結婚した。彼女は1420年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Longueville(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 노르섬프토실르 리틀 빌링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julianne de Ferrers(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1384년 이전 John Heylesdon(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Longueville nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Little Billing, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Julianne de Ferrers, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Heylesdon antes 1384. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan De Longueville родилась около 1350 г. в местности литл биллинг, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Julianne de Ferrers, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Heylesdon перед 1384 г. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan De Longueville nació aproximadamente 1350, en Little Billing, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John FitzJohn de Longueville, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Julianne de Ferrers, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Heylesdon antes de 1384. Murió en 1420, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
